content: {"businessRules": ["Financial certification rules: 9.09% for 1.1.1 and 2.1.1.", "Social security ratios: 14% (10.1) and 5% (10.2) based on total salaries.", "Strict calculation chain for cost sheets (Rules 6-13) covering Total Cost (12.1), Price (13.2), Taxes (13.3), and Unit Prices (15.1, 16.1).", "Standard format compliance verification."], "business_logic": "L\u00f3gica de negocio para validations.", "dependencies": ["@/types/cost-sheet"], "domain": "Engine", "exports": ["ValidationResult", "HealthSummary", "calculateCostSheetHealth"], "id": "src/lib/cost-engine/validations.ts", "name": "validations.ts", "technical_description": "M\u00f3dulo t\u00e9cnico validations.", "user_description": "M\u00f3dulo del sistema para gestionar validations.ts."}
